name: Toronto
industries: Banking transformation portfolios, healthcare and transit programs, and Canada's largest tech ecosystem drive hiring.
intro: Toronto is Canada's project capital by weight of institutions: the Big Five banks run their transformation portfolios from Bay Street, the province's healthcare and transit programs are among North America's largest, and a tech ecosystem behind only the Valley and NYC keeps hiring delivery leads. Canadian employers are famously credential-conscious — PMP appears in postings as a requirement, not a preference, and newcomers use it to localize international experience. Batches are scheduled live online across the whole year at hours built for Toronto: a weekend Sat–Sun cohort and a weekday Wed–Thu cohort each week, all landing in comfortable local daytime; every upcoming date and its exact Toronto timing is listed in the schedule below. The format never changes: live weekend instruction, exam application support, full-length mock exams, and trainer access until you pass.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Toronto?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM CT, which is 10:00 AM – 07:00 PM EDT in Toronto. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Toronto?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Toronto. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Canada?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Canada and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Toronto sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Canada accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Toronto — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Toronto: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
